english translation text: Ziarat of Imam Hussein [AS] for the night of Eid

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ آدَمَ صَفْوَةِ اللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Adam the choice of Allah.

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ نُوحٍ أَمِينِ اللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Noah the trustee of Allah.

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ إِبْرَاهِيمَ خَلِيلِ اللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be upon you O inheritor of Abraham the Friend of Allah.

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ مُوسٰى كَلِيمِ اللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Moses the spoken by Allah.

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ عِيسٰى رُوحِ اللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Jesus the spirit of Allah.
Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Muhammad,

arabic text: صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ حَبِيبِ اللَّهِ
english translation text: blessings of Allah be upon him and his Household, the most-beloved of Allah.

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ عَلِيٍّ حُجَّةِ اللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of `Ali the Argument of Allah.

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ أَيُّهَا الْوَصِيُّ الْبَرُّ التَّقِيُّ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O obedient and pious successor.

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا ثَارَ اللَّهِ وَابْنَ ثَارِهِ وَالْوِتْرَ الْمَوْتُورَ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O vengeance of Allah, son of His vengeance, and the unavenged so far.
I bear witness that you performed the prayers,
defrayed the poor-rate,
enjoined the right,
forbade the evil,
and strove for the sake of Allah as exactly as strife must be
until your inviolability was violated and you were slain wrongfully.
Peace be upon you, O Aba-`Abdullah.

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا ابْنَ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O son of Allah’s Messenger.

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا ابْنَ سَيِّدِ الْوَصِيِّينَ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O son of the chief of the prophets’ successors.

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا ابْنَ فَاطِمَةَ الزَّهْرَاءِ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O son of Fatimah the luminous lady
and the doyenne of the women of the worlds.
Peace be upon you, O hero of Muslims.
O my master,

arabic text: أَشْهَدُ أَنَّكَ كُنْتَ نُورًا فِيْ الْأَصْلاَبِ الشَّامِخَةِ
english translation text: I bear witness that You were light in the lofty loins
and purified wombs.
The ignorance could not stain you with its impurities
or dress you its gloomy garbs.
I also bear witness that you are one of the pillars of the religion,
the supports of Muslims,
and the havens of the faithful believers.

arabic text: وَأَشْهَدُ أَنَّكَ الْإِمَامُ الْبَرُّ التَّقِيُّ الرَّضِيُّ
english translation text: I also bear witness that you are the God-fearing, pious, pleased,
pure, guide, and well-guided Imam.
I also bear witness that the Imams from your progeny
are the spokesmen of piety, the signs of guidance,
the firmest handle [of Islam],
and the arguments against the inhabitants of this world.
To Allah we belong and to Him is our return.
O my master, I am loyal to your loyalists
and enemy of your enemies.
I also believe in you all and in your Return
and I have full confidence in the laws of my religion
and in the seals of my deeds.
My heart is at peace with your heart
and all my affairs are following your commands.
O my master, I have come to you fearful; so, [please] secure me.
I have come to you seeking shelter; so, [please] grant me shelter.
I have come to you deprived; so, [please] grant me wealth.
My chief and master,

arabic text: أَنْتَ مَوْلَايَ حُجَّةُ اللَّهِ عَلَى الخَلْقِ أَجْمَعِينَ
english translation text: you are, O my master, Allah’s argument against all of His creatures.
I believe in your secret and open affairs,
in your visible and invisible affairs,
and in the foremost and the last of you.

arabic text: وَأَشْهَدُ أَنَّكَ التَّالِيْ لِكِتَابِ اللَّهِ وَأَمِيْنُ اللَّهِ
english translation text: I also bear witness that you have recited the Book of Allah and you are the Trustee of Allah,

arabic text: اَلدَّاعِيْ إِلَى اللَّهِ بِالْحِكْمَةِ وَالْمَوْعِظَةِ الْحَسَنَةِ
english translation text: who calls to Allah with wisdom and excellent exhortation.
May Allah curse the people who wronged you.

arabic text: وَلَعَنَ اللَّهُ أُمَّةً سَمِعَتْ بِذٰلِكَ فَرَضِيَتْ بِهِ
english translation text: May Allah curse the people who were pleased when they heard of that.
Ziarat of Hazrat Ali Akbar [A]
Peace be upon you, O Allah’s intimate servant.

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا ابْنَ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O son of Allah’s Messenger.

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا ابْنَ خَاتَمِ النَّبِيِّينَ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O son of the seal of the prophets.
Peace be upon you, O son of Fatimah
the doyenne of the women of the worlds.
Peace be upon you, O son of the Commander of the Faithful.
Peace be upon you, O persecuted and martyred.
May Allah accept my father and my mother as ransoms for you.
You lived happily
and were killed as wronged and martyred.
Ziarat of Shuhada

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلَيْكُمْ أَيُّهَا الذَّابُّونَ عَنْ تَوْحِيدِ اللَّهِ
english translation text: Peace be upon you all, O defenders of [the faith of] Allah’s Oneness.
Peace be upon you because you were constant.
How excellent then the issue of the abode is.
May Allah accept my father and my mother as ransoms for you.
You achieved a great success.
Ziarat of Hazrat Abbas [A]

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ أَيُّهَا الْعَبْدُ الصَّالِحُ وَالصِّدِّيقُ الْمُوَاسِي
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O righteous servant [of Allah] and veracious self-sacrificing.
I bear witness that you believed in Allah,
supported the son of Allah’s Messenger,
called to the way of Allah,
and sacrificed yourself for Him.

arabic text: فَعَلَيْكَ مِنَ اللَّهِ أَفْضَلُ التَّحِيَّةِ وَالسَّلامِ
english translation text: So, the most favorite greetings and compliments of Allah be upon you.
Then say

arabic text: بِأَبِيْ أَنْتَ وَأُمِّيْ يَا نَاصِرَ دِينِ اللَّهِ
english translation text: May Allah accept my father and mother as ransoms for you, O supporter of Allah’s religion.

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا نَاصِرَ الْحُسَيْنِ الصِّدِّيقِ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O supporter of al-Husayn the veracious.

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا نَاصِرَ الْحُسَيْنِ الشَّهِيدِ
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O supporter of al-Husayn the martyr.
Peace from me be upon you
as long as I am existent and as long as there are day and night.
